subcodes.first_line: O thou who strivest towards that farthest shore to spread the fragrances of God, dispatch beforehand a telegram to Iraq [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من یسعی الی تلک العدوه القصوی نشرا لنفحات الله از پیش تلغراف بعراق ارسال
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @personal instructions, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
